latHint: Think secretly hiding something away - not a manufacturing site.
pivHint: A factory is also called a PLANT - but to PLANT evidence means to secretly do what with it?
winText: Squirreled away. PLANT was the pivot - factory site to secretly HOARD something.
lossText: HOARD - to secretly stockpile. PLANT was the pivot: factory PLANT to PLANT a hidden HOARD.
